monorepo.comment: Pre-monorepo state: workspace contains docs only. Phase 5 lifts packages/shared. Phase 6 scaffolds apps/mobile.

shared.purpose: Navigator scoring, sensitivity filter, PEAF validators, types, constants

api.purpose: Typed wrappers around Supabase auth, queries, and edge functions

i18n.purpose: Translation strings shared across web and mobile (en, pt, es, sv, fr)

tooling.comment: Locked 2026-05-09 to May-2026 stable stack (SDK 54). Most fields previously null; now committed per Day-1 decision in learnings.md.
tooling.linter: Biome — NOT INSTALLED (planned Phase 7; no biome dep in any package.json yet)
tooling.formatter: Biome — NOT INSTALLED (planned Phase 7; no biome dep in any package.json yet)
tooling.componentLibraryComment: Locked at Phase 4. Same shadcn mental model as web app. Copy-paste source ownership; aria-based a11y. Components mirror to apps/mobile/src/components/ui/ once Phase 6 scaffolds the mobile workspace.
tooling.auth: Supabase Auth (TOTP MFA + Passkeys + Apple/Google OAuth)
tooling.sdkUpgradePath: SDK 54 for V1; SDK 55 or 56 evaluated for V1.1 post-launch

hooks.comment: Phase 4 ships four PreToolUse hooks + one Stop hook + one SessionStart hook. All Sacred Rule patterns derive from constitution.md YAML front-matter. Hook scripts must NEVER hardcode patterns.

phase4Hooks.mechanism: deterministic case-insensitive seed-phrase scan over constitution.md forbidden_phrase_seeds
phase4Hooks.semanticLayer: NOT-IMPLEMENTED — Haiku paraphrase layer planned only, never run; see docs/SR-3-paraphrase-coverage-DEFERRED.md (close-by Phase 11)
phase4Hooks.enforces: No diagnostic language in user-facing copy
Symptom data never appears in telemetry

phase11HooksDeferred: SR-5: No therapeutic claims (string-level, calibrated against shipped strings)

design.approach: fully independent — two design systems separately maintained
design.sensorialDefault: restraint with three signature touchpoints + opt-in rich mode
design.structureComment: Web and mobile have separate, fully-independent visual languages. No shared design layer. The only shared identity carrier is the clay figures (see clayFigures section below).

web.extractionSource: psychage-v2 tailwind.config.ts + shipping screens + brand identity work
web.informationArchitectureComment: Web app uses hub-and-spoke navigation (existing pattern from psychage-v2). Documented for clarity; no Phase 4.A change.
web.driftMigrationStatusComment: Slice 4 (drift migration consuming audits/web-design-drift.md) deferred at Phase 4.A close. Audit input preserved for future reactivation.

mobile.extractionSource: Phase 4.B locked decisions (IA, sensorial, clay-figure tier). No psychage-v2 mobile codebase to extract from. Color tokens copied verbatim from tokens/web.tokens.json for cross-platform identity coherence.
mobile.informationArchitectureComment: 4 bottom tabs (Today, Learn, Compass, Find) + avatar icon in header for account/settings (not a 5th tab). 'Compass' is the orienting metaphor for Symptom Navigator + Clarity Score + mood + breathing. Custom tab labels by definition satisfy /mobile-design-audit Pattern 7 (generic 4-tab nav). See DESIGN.mobile.md §2.
mobile.sensorialDimensionsComment: Mobile app is sensorial — engages haptics, subtle audio, motion, and micro-interactions throughout. Each must respect Reduce Motion / Reduce Haptics / Reduce Audio system settings. Sensory restraint over abundance. One signature sensory moment per surface, max.

sensorialTokenSummary.motion: 4 durations (swift 150ms / base 300ms / calm 600ms / breath 4000ms) + 4 easings (out/in/standard/breath) + two-tier reduced-motion (non-essential disabled, essential cross-fade 200ms, breath static-by-default with in-app toggle)
sensorialTokenSummary.haptic: 8 tokens — 5 stock (tap/affirm/confirm/celebrate/alert) + 3 sequenced (complete/breath_in/breath_out). Firing rules MUST fire on primary CTAs, nav events, form submits, tool completion, destructive-action prompts, breathing. No-haptic zones: error states, high-frequency micro-interactions, background notifications.
sensorialTokenSummary.audio: V1 empty — content audio only, no UI sound effects. V2 candidates documented (audio.complete soft chime, audio.ambient breathing backgrounds) — gated on signature-moment audit + Dobson clinical sign-off + Reduce Audio honoring.

mobile.clayFigureTierComment: ~25–35 illustrations: 5–8 onboarding + 6–10 empty states + 4–6 CTA/tab visuals + 4 tool intros + 3–5 milestone celebrations + 2–3 breathing states. Practical: style-guide-first, phased delivery, vector source + PNG export, full commercial ownership + exclusive-use clause, single character reference sheet for library consistency. See DESIGN.mobile.md §4.
mobile.auditSkillPatternsComment: All 12 anti-slop patterns active (the 10 web-applicable patterns adapted to React Native + the 2 mobile-only Pattern 7 generic-tab-nav and Pattern 11 missing-haptics-on-primary-CTAs).
mobile.driftMigrationStatusComment: Mobile is Phase 6 work. No apps/mobile/ source to migrate. /mobile-design-audit applies once the codebase exists. Pre-Phase-6 the skill still passes Step 0 refusal layers cleanly (contract files exist after Phase 4.B merges).

clayFigures.roleComment: Faceless, genderless, raceless matte-white figures representing universal humanity. The only visual element shared between web and mobile design languages.
clayFigures.pipelineComment: Finite library of 30-40 figures produced by an illustrator. NO code-time generation pipeline (no GPT-image / DALL-E in the build). Components reference figures by name from a versioned asset library.
clayFigures.libraryDeadlineComment: Hard prerequisite for Phase 11. Phase 4.B close criteria includes commissioning the illustrator and locking the figure manifest. Lead time 2-4 weeks plus iteration.

subscriptions.comment: Recurring costs tracked at workspace level. Reviewed at each phase close.

mobbinPro.purpose: Mobile UI pattern reference library — flows from Headspace, Calm, Linear, Things, Notion, etc. Used by /spec-design when generating mobile screen specs.
mobbinPro.subscribeAtPhaseComment: Not paid during Phase 4 or 4.A. Subscription begins at Phase 4.B kickoff when reference flows are first needed.

auth.scope: tier model, just-in-time prompts, Supabase Auth methods, GDPR deletion

offline.scope: per-surface offline behavior, MMKV FIFO queue, dead-letter, crisis cache

architecture.scope: cross-app contract, schema, RLS policies, WebView token bridge, V1->V2 path

scoped.comment: Populated as packages and apps come online (Phases 5, 6).

hardcodedInSkills.rationale: Confidence above 0.75 reads as diagnosis. Capped 3x in code (geometric mean ceiling, post-modifier ceiling, output ceiling).
Halts Symptom Navigator at any severity. No flag, branch, or environment can disable.
Phrases like 'you have', 'diagnosis confirmed', 'this means you are' are forbidden in user-facing copy. Educational framing only.
hardcodedInSkills.enforcedIn: Sensitivity filter + Dr. Lena Dobson clinical review on user-facing surfaces

hardcodedInSkills.rationale: MMKV-only persistence on mobile. No Sentry breadcrumb, analytics event, Supabase write, or third-party transmission contains raw symptoms.

referencedFromClaudeMd: @/ path alias mandatory (no deep relative imports)
Tailwind only (no CSS modules, styled-components, inline styles)
ArticleRecord has NO description field (use seo_description)
Sanity CMS dormant (Supabase is sole article source)
Article cascade: Supabase primary -> TSX mock fallback
Required article enrichment: summary, keyFacts (5), sparkMoment, practicalExercise

specs.comment: INDEX.md is auto-created by /spec-discovery on first invocation. Lists every spec with status (discovery|requirements|design|tasks|review|implementing|complete|abandoned).
specs.mockComment: Single .specs/_smoke_test/ folder used by phase smoke tests. Gitignored. Wiped at each phase close so the next phase starts fresh. Reused across phases (Phase 4 uses it for spec-workflow shakedown, Phase 5+ may use it for their own smoke tests).

review.fileIsolationPolicyComment: Per Q5 of Phase 4: any pair of tasks marked Parallelizable in tasks.md that share a file path causes /spec-review to return Block. No override. Phase 7 may add pre-commit hook reinforcement.
review.sequentialOnlyComment: Tasks touching these files must be marked Parallelizable=false. They are shared-config and cannot be edited concurrently.

openSecurityQuestions.comment: Open questions surfaced in rules/security.md. Each item has a target phase or trigger gate. Resolved questions move out (commitSHA captured at resolution); this block is not a historical log.

cert-pinning-library.question: Cert pinning library choice (TrustKit / NS App Transport Security / react-native-ssl-pinning)

post-mortem-template.question: Post-mortem template (public for Sev0/Sev1 user-data impact)

state-law-breach-windows.question: State-law breach notification exact windows (WA MHMDA, CT DPA, etc.)

design-mobile-written.deliverable: DESIGN.mobile.md + tokens/mobile.tokens.json + .claude/skills/mobile-design-audit/ (incl. clay figure Tier 3 sensorial-complete scope)

parallel-infra-deployed.deliverableComment: Worktree scripts shipped (scripts/worktree-{create,list,remove}.sh + scripts/README.md). The 5-layer enforcement is documented in workspace.json `parallelization` block (added in PR #9); a standalone rules/parallel.md was not written — defer to Phase 7 if a single source-of-truth surface is needed.

4.label: spec-driven workflow skills + workspace.json + constitution.md + 4 SR hooks + smoke-test fixtures

4.B.label: DESIGN.mobile.md + tokens/mobile.tokens.json + /mobile-design-audit (12 patterns) + mobile IA decision (4 bottom tabs Today/Learn/Compass/Find + avatar-in-header) + clay figure Tier 3 sensorial-complete scope + Mobbin Pro subscription + clay-figure SessionStart gate

5.label: worktree scripts + packages/shared lift
5.closedSHAsComment: Chronological: PR #9 posture (2da548e), PR #10 recon (80efd4a), PR #11 packages/shared squash (4a94878), PR #12 Slice 3 feat branch SHA (6615bff, rebased to fb6580d on main), PR #12 Slice 3 chore on main (c6c6732, rebase-merged). Closed via chore/phase-5-to-6-transition per rules/conventions.md §2.

6.label: Expo scaffold + apps/mobile + packages/api + packages/i18n + react-native-reusables + Storybook RN + i18n namespacing + test runner lock
6.gapsComment: Status corrected complete->in-progress 2026-06-04: apps/mobile + Expo scaffold + test-runner lock SHIPPED, but four named deliverables are absent in the tree (only packages/shared exists; no rn-reusables or Storybook in any package.json). Label scope not fully met.
6.closedSHAsComment: Chronological = merge order on main. Phase 6 Slices 2-9 + close-out. Per conventions.md §2 enumerates feat + chore + transition + fix. Excludes 15d3383 (phase-5 transition commit) and e5e8229 (rebase artifact, byte-identical duplicate of dbb6665). Closed via chore/phase-6-close: hygiene (3b32b48), cold-start migrator fix (fee93f2), Node 22 pin (1802936), CI pr-checks (90a2ea8, 956cd8b), PR #26 android.package align (990749e), SR-3 hook repair (438c144). Mood Quick-Check tracer bullet dropped from label and reassigned to Phase 9/11 — analytics vendor (PostHog vs Amplitude) is a blocked open scope per project CLAUDE.md §5, so the 'TestFlight + 48h real-device use' bar from docs/AUDIT_RESPONSE_FINAL.md:60 cannot be met here. See learnings.md (Phase 6 close-out). Housekeeping append (this commit): d63aed6 (branch SHA of chore/phase-6-close close commit) + 725cb2f (PR #28 squash on main). PR #14 (Slice 1 recon, stale) closed in same batch.

7.label: biome + husky + lint-staged + Tier 2 hooks (PEAF/sensitivity/etc.) + _shared skill block + DoD field per task + _metrics.jsonl SessionEnd hook + /spec-verify per-PR decision

8.label: SR hooks enforced in CI via sacred-rules job (branch-diff, --base-ref + added-lines filter, fail-closed) AND local husky; branch protection requires both checks (strict). CODEOWNERS + PR template. Fixes landed: SR-2 object-property crisis-flag pattern, seed-list relocated to JSON, SIGPIPE fail-open in SR-1/2/3, Python/PyYAML dependency removed (hooks now bash+git+node). EAS preview/prod deferred to Phase 9; EAS Update OTA moved to Phase 11.
8.closedSHAsComment: Chronological merge order on main. df384da (de-Python SR hooks). 8e4a28d (combined: SR-in-CI sacred-rules job + --base-ref wiring + added-lines filter; replaces unpushed 571ca49). Then PR #33 recovery batch (4 stranded SHAs re-landed): 9bf33bf (was 400dab2, SR-2 object-property crisis-flag pattern), 9ab055e (was b1e2a36, CODEOWNERS + PR template), 7de9b19 (was 41a7a4e, seed-list to JSON; conflict-resolved), 7e99054 (re-application of 59c9a46 against de-Python hook structure: SIGPIPE here-strings + per-file globs-bypass walk composed with 8e4a28d added-lines filter). 7568892 = PR #33 merge commit. Branch protection set via gh api (strict: true, enforce_admins: false, required contexts: 'sacred rules (branch diff)' + 'typecheck + test'). Repo flipped private→public during close cleanup; gitleaks scan of all 70 commits returned 0 findings — technical exposure null, strategic/legal review (fiscal sponsorship, Dr. Dobson, counsel) deferred as separate decision. LOAD-BEARING LESSON: SR-in-CI was absent/broken on main in four distinct ways and every local verification missed all four — only forcing observed red-then-green on a real PR into main (PR #32) caught them. A Sacred Rule / CI check is not done until observed firing red AND passing green on a real PR into the protected branch.

9.label: Sentry RN with PII-stripping beforeSend, analytics provider, kill-switch infrastructure; EAS preview/prod build pipeline (eas init, eas.json profiles, EXPO_TOKEN secret, GitHub Actions build workflow, trigger model A); remove now-dead PyYAML install step from sacred-rules CI job; SR-3 evaluation harness (Haiku-dependent — currently ZERO automated verification, only Sacred Rule untested)
9.gapsComment: Status corrected complete->in-progress 2026-06-04 to agree with closedSHAsComment, which already admits partial delivery: only three carved-out chore slices landed (local SR recovery, SR-3 deterministic floor, EAS scaffold). Observability stack against the original label is absent.
9.closedSHAsComment: Phase 9 partial delivery — three carved-out chore slices on feat/phase-9-precommit-recover that recover Phase 8's claimed-but-untrue local SR enforcement, prove SR-3 deterministically, and scaffold managed EAS config. NOT a full Phase 9 scope close: Sentry RN + analytics + kill-switch infra remain pending against the original label and either belong to a future Phase 9 continuation or get reassigned at Phase 10 kickoff. Slice 1 (2729481): local pre-commit SR-1..4 enforcement recovered on HEAD via husky v9 + lint-staged. Phase 8's close-out asserted enforced-end-to-end local SR but the Phase 7 spine sat on feat/phase-7-precommit-spine (720d618) and never merged to main; this commit re-applies the spine fresh on HEAD and exercises an SR-3 probe end-to-end (commit blocked, non-zero exit). husky v9 sets core.hooksPath=.husky/_ by design — correct, must not be 'fixed' by future onboarding. lint-staged config is the no-op 'true' — intentional placeholder, no formatter on HEAD yet. Slice 2 (3318279): SR-3 deterministic seed-scan eval harness (Vitest, 4 violating / 3 clean fixtures, real .claude/hooks/sr3_diagnostic_language.sh invoked). 'SR-3 tested' means deterministic-only — paraphrase/semantic Haiku layer is OFF, has never run, no automated verification; tracked in docs/SR-3-paraphrase-coverage-DEFERRED.md, close-by Phase 11 alongside SR-5. A clinical assertion paraphrased around the SR-3 seed list passes silently — never read 'SR-3 tested' as full coverage. Slice 3 (dccc362): managed EAS pipeline scaffold — apps/mobile/eas.json (3 profiles, Node 22.16.0 pinned per profile), apps/mobile/app.json owner placeholder + runtimeVersion, expo-updates installed via npx expo install, .github/workflows/eas-build.yml (workflow_dispatch + EXPO_TOKEN secret), docs/EAS-PIPELINE-RUNBOOK.md. Config-complete but ACCOUNT-PENDING: app.json owner=OWNER_PLACEHOLDER, projectId/updates.url omitted, EXPO_TOKEN secret unset. Human runs docs/EAS-PIPELINE-RUNBOOK.md (eas login → init → update:configure → token:create → first sim build). eas init / update:configure WILL modify app.json — commit those after; do not hand-edit the placeholders. CORRECTIONS RECORDED FOR FUTURE INHERITANCE: (A) local SR enforcement was RECOVERED, not newly built — Phase 8's 'end-to-end' claim was false in the tree (spine on stranded branch never merged to main); (B) PyYAML carry-forward from Phase 8 summary was FALSE — recon found zero Python footprint in .github/workflows/pr-checks.yml (constitution parsing is pure bash via _parse-constitution.sh); nothing was removed this phase because nothing remained — do not re-hunt; (C) SR-3 deterministic-only — semantic/paraphrase coverage OFF, blocked on vendor/secret decision, close-by Phase 11; (D) EAS pipeline config-complete, account-pending — runbook required before first build. Carry-forwards for Phase 10: root CLAUDE.md drift (says Expo Router v4 / Tailwind v5; live tree is Router v6 + Tailwind 3.4.17 + NativeWind v4 — apps/mobile/CLAUDE.md is correct); workspace.json.tooling adjacent drift (tooling.router='Expo Router v5', tooling.nativewindVersion='v4', tooling.tailwindVersion='3.4' — reconcile alongside CLAUDE.md fix); Node-25 tsc/Metro hang landmine persists (engines pin is pnpm warning, not hard stop — see Phase 6 device-verification bookmark); feat/phase-7-precommit-spine is superseded/dead (content re-applied at 2729481 — safe to delete, human action). PHASE BOUNDARY DECISIONS THIS COMMIT: .phase flipped 6 → 10 (deviates from rules/conventions.md §4 which says bumps at next-phase kickoff; field was stale since Phase 7 kickoff anyway, this trues it up — convention §4 should be re-examined at Phase 10 kickoff). .phaseLabel flipped 'mobile-scaffold' → 'test-runner-deploy' for internal consistency with .phase=10. phaseRoadmap['10'].status NOT flipped to 'in-progress' (Phase 10 not scoped here). Phase 9 close-out chore SHA (this commit) appended in a follow-up housekeeping commit per conventions.md §2. Phase 8 set the precedent of consolidating close-out content into closedSHAsComment without writing learnings.md — followed here.

10.label: test-harness — ratify existing Vitest coverage as the floor (packages/shared cap-floor + apps/mobile logic tests); RNTL render smoke deferred to Phase 11; Maestro/E2E deferred to Phase 11+
10.gapsComment: Status corrected complete->in-progress 2026-06-04: cap-floor floor ratified; render smoke + jest-expo are absent (Slice 2 deferred to Phase 11). 'unmerged' gap cleared 2026-06-05 (PR #34 merged to main, 5c3ac6a). Floor-only.
10.closedSHAsComment: Slice 1 (cap-floor ratification): NO COMMIT — packages/shared/navigator/__tests__/cap-floor.test.ts was lifted in Phase 5 (PR #11, 4a94878) and already covers all three angles Phase 10 Slice 1 requested (CONFIDENCE_CAP constant, runSymptomNavigator floor of hostile config cap=0.99, calculateConditionScore floor). Deliberate-break proof captured at close: sed CONFIDENCE_CAP 0.75→0.99 → vitest run → 6 cap-floor tests RED (expected 0.99 to be ≤ 0.75) across robustness.test.ts (1), scoring.test.ts (2), cap-floor.test.ts (3) → revert → 191/191 GREEN. Slice 2 (apps/mobile render smoke): DEFERRED to Phase 11. Attempted alias react-native → react-native-web per plan; vite-node spent >124s transforming the RN-web import graph then errored ECANCELED at postcss-value-parser. @testing-library/react-native's internal require('react-native') bypasses Vite's resolve.alias via node CJS loader and hits RN's Flow syntax (`Unexpected token 'typeof'`). Both Vitest paths (alias + jsdom + RTL fallback, and vi.mock with static/dynamic import) hang or error. Owed by Phase 11: jest-expo runner (canonical RN render test path) OR Maestro flow for the same screen surface. Slice 2 carry-over rule appended to learnings.md. Slice 3 (close-out): this commit. SHA appended in Phase 11 kickoff per Phase 7/8/9 precedent (chore can't self-reference). RECON FINDINGS SURFACED AT CLOSE: (A) Vitest was ALREADY installed in both packages — spec premise stale (Phase 6/9 installed it). (B) 8 navigator tests + 4 apps/mobile logic tests (navigator-seam, tier-flags-composition, tier-flags-persistence, cold-start-migrator-wiring) already shipped — apps/mobile floor is 4 files / 10 tests, not zero. (C) `pnpm -r test` ALREADY in .github/workflows/pr-checks.yml:39-40 — no CI change needed. (D) cap-floor test file already excluded by SR-1 hook's *.test.* glob (verified at .claude/hooks/sr1_navigator_confidence_cap.sh) — no runtime-assembled-trigger trick needed. STILL OWED BY FUTURE PHASE (carry-forward from Phase 9): Sentry RN (PII-stripping beforeSend), analytics vendor (PostHog vs Amplitude — blocked open decision per CLAUDE.md §5), kill-switch infra, EAS preview/prod build pipeline operational (account-pending per Phase 9 runbook), EAS Update OTA (Phase 11), SR-3 paraphrase coverage (Phase 11), SR-5 therapeutic claims hook (Phase 11). Mobile render smoke (jest-expo OR Maestro) and 1-screen Maestro E2E rolled into Phase 11. Stacked-branch deviation honored: this branch sits on feat/phase-9-precommit-recover @ 918f638; Phase 10 PR cannot merge until Phase 9 PR lands.

11.label: first feature shipped via spec workflow (Daily Check-In) + SR-5 (therapeutic claims) + full regulatory string-level codification; EAS Update OTA for crisis flow — staged rollout, rollback plan, crisis-screen test definition (moved from Phase 8)
